The '''JV-74 ion engine''' was an [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engine]] designed by [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]]. It was more powerful that the previous [[JV-71 ion engine]] and boasted three additional [[collision tube pair]]s.

The JV-74 was installed on the standard models of the [[ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter|ZH-25 ''Questor''-class]] to offset the increased size and bulk when compared to the earlier [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]].
